name: Holesail Switchboard
description: Manage multiple holesail P2P tunnels from a single dashboard
compose:
name: slashnode-holesail-switchboard
services:
  web:
    image: orenz0/holesail-switchboard:v2.0.8
    container_name: holesail-switchboard
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      HSSB_DATA_FILE: /data/data.json
      HSSB_HOST: 0.0.0.0
      HSSB_PORT: '3160'
      HSSB_CLIENT_HOST: 0.0.0.0
      HSSB_FIXED_CLIENT_PORTS: 3161-3170
      HSSB_SUBTITLE: 'For more information, visit: https://github.com/oren-z0/holesail-switchboard/blob/main/docs/Umbrel.md'
    volumes:
      - web_data:/data
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:3160:3160
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  web_data:
    name: slashnode-holesail-switchboard_web_data
